chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C. P. No.S-232 of 2025. DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 22.08.2025 Mr. Amanullah Luhur, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Bhutto, Asst. A. G a/w Inspector Qamaruddin Tunio, SHO PS B-Section Mehar, SIP Muhammad Siddique Panhwar, of CIA Dadu, ASI Adeel Ali of PS A-Section Dadu. -.-.-.-.- Statements are filed on behalf of official respondents No.1 to 5, taken on record. Perusal of statement furnished by respondent No.5 reveals that the petitioner and his other family members are involved in many criminal cases. Statement further reveals that neither they have caused harassment to the petitioner nor they intend to do so in future and any action, if taken, would be in accordance with law. Learned counsel in view of the statements seeks disposal of the petition which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
